chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1636 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 1424/25 2.For orders on CMA 6366/24 3.For orders on office objections 4.For orders on CMA 6367/24 5.For hearing of main case 04-03-2025 Mr. Abdul Hameed Mangi, Advocate for petitioners. **** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. Learned counsel for petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition on the ground that petitioners intend to file petition before the Circuit Court, Larkana. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed leaving the petitioners at liberty to file petition before Circuit Court, Larkana, if they desire so. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
